exercises.code:
g2_agent = 'skeptic'
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 100.0])
q1, q3 = s.quantile(0.25), s.quantile(0.75)
iqr = q3 - q1
mask = (s < q1 - 1.5 * iqr) | (s > q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
print(s[mask].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: [G2-Skeptic] S16-T3-B-E2: verifiqué fixture conservado y salida alineada al Pass del paquete («E2 (independiente) — Concepto: outliers estadísticos IQR 1.5.
